images.prompt: A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a stunning adult Japanese idol‑style model reclining on a poolside sunbed at golden hour, wearing a sleek black leather biker jacket draped over a sheer white silk camisole that accentuates her slim waist and ample bust, the jacket’s matte leather catching the soft teal‑orange cinematic light. She has sleek straight black hair slightly damp, flawless yet realistic skin showing fine pores, large expressive eyes, and an innocently seductive half‑smile, gazing eye‑level into the camera as if addressing fans. The background is a blurred high‑end rooftop pool deck with gentle bokeh of city lights, reinforcing a lonely urban atmosphere. Shot on a Sony A7R IV with an 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, the shallow depth of field isolates her figure, while global illumination and ray‑tracing create lifelike reflections and a vibrant teal‑and‑orange color grade.8k photo, Large breasts
